title: CBSE Group A B C Various Post Tier II Exam Result 2026
short_information: Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) has relased Group A, Group B & Group C Exam Notification. Those candidates who are Enrolled in this CBSE Group A B C Recruitment 2025 Exam can Download Result. Read the notification for CBSE Group A B C Exam, eligibility, Vacancy Details information, Document Required, age limit, How to Apply and all other information. Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) CBSE Group A B C Recruitment 2025 Advt No. CBSE/Rectt.Cell/14(88)/2025 : Short Details of Notification
application_fee: Group A: General / OBC / EWS: Rs. 1750/- Group B: General / OBC / EWS: Rs. 1050/- Group C: General / OBC / EWS: Rs. 1050/- SC / ST / Female : Rs. 250/- PH (Divyang) : Rs. 250/- Pay the Examination Fee Through Cast at E Challan or Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking CBSE Group A B C
eligibility: 01/25 (A) Assistant Secretary (Pay Level – 10) 35 08 Graduation Degree in Any Stream from Any Recognized University. 02/25 (A) Assistant Professor & Assistant Director (Academics) (Pay Level – 10) 30 12 Post Graduate Degree in any discipline with 55% marks (or equivalent grade) from a recognized University/ Institute with provision of applicable concession to the respective categories 03/25 (A) Assistant Professor & Assistant Director (Training) (Pay Level – 10) 30 08 Post Graduate Degree in any discipline with 55% marks (or equivalent grade) from a recognized University/ Institute with provision of applicable concession to the respective categories 04/25 (A) Assistant Professor & Assistant Director (Skill Education) (Pay Level – 10) 30 07 Post Graduate Degree in any discipline with 55% marks (or equivalent grade) from a recognized University/ Institute with provision of applicable concession to the respective categories 05/25 (A) Accounts Officer (Pay Level – 10) 35 02 Bachelor’s degree of a recognized University/ Institution with Economics/ Commerce/ Accounts/ Finance/ Business Studies/ Cost Accounting as one of the subject. OR Bachelor’s degree of a recognized University/Institution and having SAS/JAO(C) examination conducted by any Account/Audit Services/Department of the Central/State Govt. OR Post Graduate of a recognized University/Institution with Economics/ Commerce / Accounts/ Finance/ Business Studies/ Cost Accounting as one of the subject. OR M.B.A. (Finance)/Chartered Accountant/ICWA. 06/25 (B) Superintendent (Pay Level – 6) 30 27 Bachelor’s Degree from a recognized University or equivalent. Working knowledge of Computer/Computer Applications such as Windows, MS-Office, handling of large database, Internet 07/25 (B) Junior Translation Officer (Pay Level – 6) 30 09 Master’s Degree of a Recognized University in Hindi with English as a compulsory or elective subject or as the medium of examination at the Degree Level. OR Master’s Degree of a Recognized Uni

tables.table_name: CBSE Group A B C Notification 2025 : Age Limit as on 22/12/2025 Maximum Age : 35 Years (Post Wise) Age Relaxation Extra as per CBSE Group A B C Recruitment Rules.
rows: CBSE Group A B C Eligibility
Graduation Degree in Any Stream from Any Recognized University.
Post Graduate Degree in any discipline with 55% marks (or equivalent grade) from a recognized University/ Institute with provision of applicable concession to the respective categories
Post Graduate Degree in any discipline with 55% marks (or equivalent grade) from a recognized University/ Institute with provision of applicable concession to the respective categories
Assistant Professor & Assistant Director (Skill Education) (Pay Level – 10)
Post Graduate Degree in any discipline with 55% marks (or equivalent grade) from a recognized University/ Institute with provision of applicable concession to the respective categories

Bachelor’s degree of a recognized University/ Institution with Economics/ Commerce/ Accounts/ Finance/ Business Studies/ Cost Accounting as one of the subject. OR Bachelor’s degree of a recognized University/Institution and having SAS/JAO(C) examination conducted by any Account/Audit Services/Department of the Central/State Govt. OR Post Graduate of a recognized University/Institution with Economics/ Commerce / Accounts/ Finance/ Business Studies/ Cost Accounting as one of the subject. OR M.B.A. (Finance)/Chartered Accountant/ICWA.
Bachelor’s Degree from a recognized University or equivalent. Working knowledge of Computer/Computer Applications such as Windows, MS-Office, handling of large database, Internet

Master’s Degree of a Recognized University in Hindi with English as a compulsory or elective subject or as the medium of examination at the Degree Level. OR Master’s Degree of a Recognized University in English with Hindi as a compulsory or elective subject or as the medium of examination at the Degree Level. OR Master’s Degree of a recognized University in any subject other than Hindi or English, with Hindi medium and English as a compulsory or elective subject or as the medium of examination at the Degree Level. OR Master’s Degree of a recognized University in any subject other than Hindi or English, with English medium and Hindi as a compulsory or elective subject or as the medium of xamination at the Degree Level. OR Master’s Degree of a recognized University in any subject other than Hindi or English, with Hindi and English as a compulsory or elective subject or either of the two as a medium of examination and the other as a compulsory or elective subject at Degree Level. AND Recognized Diploma or Certificate Course in translation from Hindi to English and vice-versa or three years’ experience in of translation work from Hindi to English and vice-versa in a Central or State Government Office, including Government of India undertaking.

12th Class from a recognized Board/ University/ Institution with Accountancy/ Business Studies/ Economics/ Commerce/ Entrepreneurship/ Finance/ Business Administration/ Taxation/ Cost Accounting as one of the subject AND A typing speed of 35 w.p.m. in English or 30 w.p.m. in Hindi on Computer.

12th Class or equivalent qualification from a recognized Board or University. A typing speed of 35 w.p.m. in English or 30 w.p.m. in Hindi on Computer (35 w.p.m. and 30 w.p.m. correspond to 10500 KDPH/ 9000 KDPH on an average of 5 key depressions for each word)

text_sections.section: How to Fill CBSE Group A B C Recruitment Online Form 2025
text_sections.content: CBSE Group A B C Recruitment for Various Post Candidate Can Apply Between 02/12/2025 to 22/12/2025 | Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in CBSE Group A B C Recruitment 2026. | Kindly Check and Collect the All Document - Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. | Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form - Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. | Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. | If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed. | Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
